classification_profile.one_line_description: LinkedIn Ads exposes marketing, ads, or messaging APIs with a mix of campaign, audience, and messaging workflows.
classification_profile.main_blocker: LinkedIn marketing access is typically partnership- and use-case-gated compared with more open APIs.
classification_profile.notes: Classification is based on public developer portals, but ad/marketing access policies often need deeper app-level validation.
